title: Custom Leather Armor
description: Gives different colored leather armor unique effects
body:
# Custom Leather Armor

You can dye leather armor, but it has no practical use, which is why I made this data pack that gives all 16 main colored leather armors unique abilities (only works for armors that have one dye).

After loading the data pack, type `/trigger ability` in chat to get the ability item used for active abilities.


## Abilities


### White Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Active Ability: Spawns 1 cow (60 seconds cooldown)
- 2 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Spawns 2 cows (45 seconds cooldown)
- 3 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Spawns 4 cows (30 seconds cooldown)
- 4 pieces:
    - Cures all effects
    - Active Ability: Spawns 8 cows (15 seconds cooldown)

### Orange Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Gives Fire Resistance
    - Active Ability: Spawns a fireball (60 seconds cooldown)
- 2 pieces:
    - Gives Fire Resistance
    - Gives a 1x1 fire trail
    - Active Ability: Spawns a fireball (50 seconds cooldown)
- 3 pieces:
    - Gives Fire Resistance
    - Gives a 3x3 fire trail
    - Active Ability: Spawns a fireball (40 seconds cooldown)
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives Fire Resistance
    - Gives a 5x5 fire trail that turns lava into basalt
    - Active Ability: Spawns a fireball (30 seconds cooldown)

### Magenta Armor:
- Is enchanted with Protection IV, Unbreaking III and Mending when held in main hand

### Light Blue Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Gives 3 additional armor points
- 2 pieces:
    - Gives 6 additional armor points
- 3 pieces:
    - Gives 9 additional armor points
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives 13 additional armor points

### Yellow Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Gives Speed I
    - Gives Haste I
- 2 pieces:
    - Gives Speed II
    - Gives Haste IV
- 3 pieces:
    - Gives Speed II
    - Gives Haste VII
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives Speed II
    - Gives Haste XXI

### Lime Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Wooden Swords in main hand get enchanted with Looting III
- 2 pieces:
    - Wooden and Stone Swords in main hand get enchanted with Looting III
- 3 pieces:
    - Wooden, Stone, Iron and Gold Swords in main hand get enchanted with Looting III
- 4 pieces:
    - All Swords in main hand get enchanted with Looting III

### Pink Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Active Ability: Gives Regeneration I for 10 seconds (25 seconds cooldown)
- 2 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives Regeneration II for 10 seconds (22.5 seconds cooldown)
- 3 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives Regeneration III for 10 seconds (20 seconds cooldown)
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives passive Regeneration I
    - Active Ability: Gives Regeneration IV for 10 seconds (15 seconds cooldown)

### Gray Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Gives Resistance I
    - Gives 25 Max Health
- 2 pieces:
    - Gives Resistance II
    - Gives 30 Max Health
    - Active Ability: Gives Absorbtion I for 60 seconds (36 seconds cooldown)
- 3 pieces:
    - Gives Resistance III
    - Gives 35 Max Health
    - Active Ability: Gives Absorbtion I for 60 seconds (33 seconds cooldown)
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives Resistance IV
    - Gives 40 Max Health
    - Active Ability: Gives Absorbtion II for 60 seconds (30 seconds cooldown)

### Light Gray Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Gives 0.25 Knockback Resistance
    - Gives 4 Armor Toughness Knockback Resistance
    - Active Ability: Mines out a 3x3x3 area (20 seconds cooldown)
- 2 pieces:
    - Gives 0.5 Knockback Resistance
    - Gives 8 Armor Toughness Knockback Resistance
    - Active Ability: Mines out a 3x3x3 area (15 seconds cooldown)
- 3 pieces:
    - Gives 0.75 Knockback Resistance
    - Gives 12 Armor Toughness Knockback Resistance
    - Active Ability: Mines out a 5x5x5 area (10 seconds cooldown)
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives 1 Knockback Resistance
    - Gives 16 Armor Toughness Knockback Resistance
    - Active Ability: Mines out a 7x7x7 area (5 seconds cooldown)

### Cyan Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Active Ability: Gives Resistance CCLV for 1 second, spawns TNT, gives Poison for 8 seonds (7 seconds cooldown)
- 2 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives Resistance CCLV for 1 second, spawns TNT, gives Poison for 6 seonds (5 seconds cooldown)
- 3 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives Resistance CCLV for 1 second, spawns TNT, gives Poison for 4 seonds (3 seconds cooldown)
- 4 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives Resistance CCLV for 1 second, spawns TNT, gives Poison for 2 seonds (1 seconds cooldown)

### Purple Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Active Ability: Gives 1 Ender Pearl (60 seconds cooldown)
- 2 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives 2 Ender Pearls (50 seconds cooldown)
- 3 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives 3 Ender Pearls (40 seconds cooldown)
- 4 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives 4 Ender Pearls, tells distance to nearest Stronghold (30 seconds cooldown)

### Blue Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Gives Conduit Power I
- 2 pieces:
    - Gives Conduit Power I
    - Gives Dolphin's Grace I
- 3 pieces:
    - Gives Conduit Power I
    - Gives Dolphin's Grace II
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives Conduit Power I
    - Gives Dolphin's Grace II
    - Active Ability: Spawns Water on you to block fall damage (5 seconds cooldown)

### Brown Armor:
- 4 pieces:
    - Constantly spawns Dirt below you, allowing you to walk in midair

Green Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Spawns vegetation (moss, crimson and warped plants) below you
    - Increases your Attack Speed by 1
- 2 pieces:
    - Spawns vegetation (moss, crimson and warped plants) below you
    - Increases your Attack Speed by 2
- 3 pieces:
    - Spawns vegetation (moss, crimson and warped plants) below you
    - Increases your Attack Speed by 3
- 4 pieces:
    - Spawns vegetation (moss, crimson and warped plants) below you
    - Increases your Attack Speed by 4
    - Active Ability: Gives Saturation for 1 second (20 seconds cooldown)

### Red Armor:
- 1 piece:
    - Active Ability: Gives Strength I for 10 seconds (25 seconds cooldown)
- 2 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives Strength II for 10 seconds (22.5 seconds cooldown)
- 3 pieces:
    - Active Ability: Gives Strength III for 10 seconds (20 seconds cooldown)
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives passive Strength I
    - Active Ability: Gives Strength IV for 10 seconds (15 seconds cooldown)

### Black Armor:
- Boots are enchanted with Soul Speed III when held in main hand
- 1 piece:
    - Gives all other entities within a 3 block radius Wither II for 1 seconds
    - Ash particles appear within that radius
- 2 pieces:
    - Gives all other entities within a 4 block radius Wither III for 3 seconds
    - Ash particles appear within that radius
- 3 pieces:
    - Gives all other entities within a 5 block radius Wither IV for 5 seconds
    - Ash particles appear within that radius
- 4 pieces:
    - Gives all other entities within a 6 block radius Wither V for 7 seconds
    - Ash particles appear within that radius

﻿NOTE: When loading this data pack for the first time on your world, you will trigger all abilites at once for a single tick. This only happens once and probably won't kill you, but be careful.
